title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; chat, stream, list local models.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama; use local models as LLM or embeddings in LangChain chains.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-like interface) with multi-model chat, uploads, RAG.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI wrapper around Ollama with conversation history, syntax highlighting, markdown.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-rag
summary: LlamaIndex LLM and embeddings connectors for Ollama; build local RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Lightweight multi-arch Docker image for Ollama with CUDA and CPU variants.

title: chatbot-ollama
summary: Next.js chatbot template that connects to Ollama via ollama-js; streaming responses, Markdown.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: n8n community node to call Ollama models inside workflows; chat, completion, embeddings.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial Rust crate providing async bindings to Ollama’s REST API.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with streaming chat, embeddings, and model management.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a service in CI pipelines for testing LLM features.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to query local Ollama models from notes; templates for summarization, Q&A.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration for Ollama; use local models as generators or embedders.

title: ollama-ray
summary: Ray Serve example deploying Ollama for scalable local LLM serving across GPUs.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that streams responses from Ollama models in chat channels.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app integrating Ollama for private or channel-based LLM queries.
